file_insights.purpose: Test LLMProvider interface implementation and factory function
key_tests: Provider inheritance from LLMProvider base class
Factory raises ValueError for unknown providers with available options listed

file_insights.purpose: Test song generation with mock providers
key_tests: Provider is called with correct response_schema
Prior feedback incorporated into prompt with 'FEEDBACK FROM PREVIOUS ATTEMPT' section
Feedback section absent when no prior_feedback provided

file_insights.purpose: Test song evaluation and validation rules
key_tests: Provider called with EvalResult response schema
Bad verdict with improvements passes validation
Bad verdict with empty improvements raises EvaluationError

patterns_discovered: MockLLMProvider fixture pattern for isolated unit testing without API calls
Async/await test pattern with pytest.mark.asyncio decorator
Test class organization by module responsibility (TestProviderInterface, TestProviderFactory, etc.)
Comprehensive fixture usage for reusable sample data
Single-responsibility testing: each test validates one behavior
Edge case testing: bad verdicts with/without improvements, missing feedback sections
gotchas_discovered: EvalResult with Verdict.BAD and empty improvements list triggers EvaluationError validation
Provider factory error message must list available providers ('chutes, gemini')
generate_song must include 'FEEDBACK FROM PREVIOUS ATTEMPT' section in prompt when prior_feedback provided
Generator prompt must omit feedback section entirely when prior_feedback is None
All feedback improvements must be explicitly included in the prompt string

approach_outcome.description: Created three comprehensive test files covering all specified requirements
approach_outcome.test_coverage: Providers interface, factory pattern, generator with/without feedback, evaluator with validation
approach_outcome.methodology: Mock-based unit testing with clear separation of concerns

recommendations: Parametrize test_bad_verdict_with_improvements to test multiple improvement scenarios
Add integration tests for full feedback loop (generate → evaluate → feedback incorporation)
Test error paths more extensively (API failures, malformed responses)
Consider performance tests for large prompt handling
Add tests for provider-specific error handling (API key validation, rate limits)
